text.title: Process Mining and Intelligent Automation Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying process-mining-automation. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.symptom: Building as-is from interviews when logs exist.
antipattern.fix: Use event logs as source of truth; interviews for context only.
Conformance-check is mandatory; without it, deviations stay hidden.

antipattern.symptom: Picking automation candidates by loudest voice.
antipattern.fix: Lock scoring matrix before review; objective ranking only.

antipattern.symptom: Verdict defaults to RPA regardless of variance.
antipattern.fix: High-variance processes need orchestration or AI-assist, not brittle RPA scripts.
